## Summary

- What problem does this PR solve?
- What changed?

## Validation

- [ ] `bash ./scripts/template-audit.sh`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm test:e2e`
- [ ] `pnpm audit --prod --audit-level=moderate`

## Template Safety

- [ ] No secrets or tokens committed
- [ ] No personal email addresses or private domains in tracked files
- [ ] No machine-specific hostnames/paths
- [ ] Seed/demo content uses non-sensitive placeholder data

## Release Notes

- [ ] Changelog updated (if user-facing change)
- [ ] Backward compatibility impact documented
